name: agent-pipeline-codex
description: Multi-stage agentic pipeline runner for Codex Desktop App projects. Orchestrates manifest -> research -> plan -> test-write -> execute -> policy -> verify -> drift-detect -> critique -> auto-promote -> manager. v0.6 adds directive contracts for deterministic auto-approval of directive-conformant manifest, plan, and manager gates while preserving human fallback and judge protections.

interface.shortDescription: Manifest-driven multi-stage agent workflow for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Agent Pipeline for Codex brings the agentic-pipeline discipline to Codex Desktop App: explicit manifests, human gates, role-scoped subagents, policy checks, drift detection, critique, auto-promote, module-release rehearsal, and dual-AI audit handoff scaffolding.
